context: A newly announced Best Actor winner stands on stage and receives applause while holding his trophy.

actions.description: The man stands under the spotlight, holding the golden trophy close with visible surprise.
He looks across the audience, smiling with joy and gratitude as applause rises.
He steadies the trophy proudly at chest height while stage lights flare behind him.
